summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (backend expiration enforcement) and REQ-2 (frontend real-time expiration check at download time). REQ-2 is clearly implemented in PasteViewPage.tsx with a fresh backend check via useCheckPasteNotExpired before every download. REQ-1 appears to be addressed in backend/main.mo with expiration checks in verifyPasteAccess, but the diff is truncated and we cannot fully verify that blob/attachment retrieval endpoints enforce this check. The frontend hook useCheckPasteNotExpired is added to useQueries.ts. Overall implementation appears substantially complete with minor uncertainty due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Both file attachments and image data are subject to the same backend expiration enforcement when retrieving blobs.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated after showing verifyPasteAccess with an expiration check, but the actual blob/attachment retrieval endpoints (e.g., getFile, loadFile, or equivalent) are not visible in the diff. We cannot confirm that the expiration check is applied at the point of blob retrieval rather than only at the paste metadata level.
